title: St Giles Academy (Lincolnshire): warning notice
body: "Notice relating to: St Giles Academy  URN: 146561  Notice issued to: Harbour Learning Trust  Reason for issue: ‘special measures’ Ofsted judgement  DfE regional director: Carol Gray  DfE regional director office: East Midlands  Local authority: Lincolnshire County Council "

taxons.title: Inspection of maintained schools and academies
